popup.notice.disabled.title: Lingo is paused
popup.notice.disabled.message: Enable Lingo in settings to translate webpages.
popup.notice.noService.title: Connect a translation service
popup.notice.noService.message: Choose where webpage text is sent before translating.
popup.notice.noPermission.title: Page access is unavailable
popup.notice.noPermission.message: Lingo needs permission to read and present this webpage.
popup.notice.unsupported.title: This page cannot be translated
popup.notice.unsupported.message: Browser settings, store pages, and internal pages are protected.
popup.notice.quota.title: Service balance is insufficient
popup.notice.authentication.title: Service credentials were rejected
popup.notice.rateLimit.title: Service is temporarily limited
popup.notice.error.title: Translation stopped
popup.session.label: Page translation
popup.options.label: Current page options
popup.translateInterface.help: Include navigation, buttons, headers, and footers.
options.subtitle: Choose your reading language and connect a translation service.
options.sections.label: Settings sections
options.interfaceLanguage.help: Choose the language used by Lingo's controls and settings.
options.sourceLanguage.help: Automatic detection works for most pages.
options.targetLanguage.help: The language used for translated paragraphs.
options.automation.title: Automatic translation
options.automation.enabled.help: Allow Lingo to begin translation when a matching rule applies.
options.automation.defaultSites.help: Use Lingo's built-in rules for selected reading sites.
options.automation.communityRules.help: Accept only signed community rule updates stored on this device.
options.rules.title: Site rules
options.quality.title: Translation quality
options.quality.template.help: Sets the default style for translated paragraphs.
options.quality.siteGlossary.help: Override terminology only when translating a matching hostname.
options.provider.privacyNote: The test sends only the fixed word “Hello”. When translating, webpage text is sent directly from the extension to this provider. Credentials remain in this browser profile. Provider pricing and data handling are governed by your provider account.
options.privacy.title: Privacy and device data
options.privacy.grantAccess: Grant site access in your browser extension controls.
options.privacy.dataFlowHelp: Credentials stay in this browser profile. Lingo has no telemetry endpoint.
options.settings.label: Extension settings
options.settings.cache.help: Reuse local translations from the same service and model.
options.settings.floatingControl.help: Show a compact translate button on supported webpages.
options.settings.enabled.help: Allow Lingo to run on supported webpages.
options.settings.theme.help: Choose how Lingo follows your browser appearance.
options.status.rulesLoadError: Could not load saved site rules.
options.status.connectionError: Could not save or test this service.
options.status.rulesInvalidJson: Enter valid JSON before exporting site rules.
options.status.invalidHostname: Enter a valid hostname, such as docs.example.com.
options.status.serviceRemoved: Translation service removed from this browser.
manifest.description: Read translated webpages alongside the original text using your chosen translation service.
manifest.toggleCommand: Translate the current page or restore the original
